videos.title: Turn Any Model-Driven Power App into a Copilot Agent in Minutes #powerapps
videos.description:
Your model-driven Power Apps just got a huge upgrade! They can now be surfaced directly inside Microsoft 365 Copilot as a declarative agent with real, interactive UI. No rebuilding. No code changes. Just download a package and go.

In this video, I walk you through the full setup for this new public preview feature, including:
✅ How to enable your model-driven app for Microsoft 365 Copilot
✅ Downloading the app package and uploading it to Teams
✅ How grids and forms surface interactively inside

videos.title: Stop Rewriting Prompts: Build Reusable AI Workflows with Skills (GitHub Copilot Tutorial)
videos.description:
I is great at answering questions…
But terrible at answering the same question twice.

In this video, I show you how to fix that using AI Skills — a simple but powerful way to make your workflows reusable, consistent, and scalable.

Create a markdown file SKILL.md with a folder structure like this and you are ready to go!

.github/skills/summarizer/
└── SKILL.md


Have you tested skills yet? If so, what is the best skill you ever created that really helped you become more efficient?
Let us know

videos.title: Materialized Lake Views in Microsoft Fabric Explained (Syntax, Data Quality & Architecture)
videos.description:
Materialized Lake Views are one of the most powerful — and often misunderstood — capabilities in Microsoft Fabric.

Many people think of them as just “views that run faster.” But Materialized Lake Views actually provide a declarative way to define transformations, persist results, and enforce data quality rules directly inside the model definition.

In this video, Patrick walks through how Materialized Lake Views work and why they can change how you design data transformations in Fabric.

You'll

Power Apps.feature_name: Build generative pages using external codegen tools
Power Apps.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Apps.description: Building and iterating on generative pages becomes dramatically easier and more flexible when makers can use the coding environments and AI coding assistants they rely on daily. Today, generative pages are created inside the Power Apps Studio experience, with tedious copying and pasting of code required to utilize other coding tools and assistants. This feature unlocks a fully code‑first workflow, enabling makers to work entirely from within their preferred codegen tool, such as GitHub Copilot o

Power Apps.feature_name: Enforce the modern, refreshed look in model-driven apps
Power Apps.description: Making the modern look universal gives you a consistent, accessible, and modern experience. Organizations benefit from simplified governance, reduced support overhead, and reliable rollout of UX improvements across environments, freeing admins and makers to focus on solutions rather than maintaining UI exceptions.

Power Apps.feature_name: Use streamlined header and navigation for better viewing
Power Apps.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Power Apps.description: The refreshed header and navigation experience provides a cleaner, more efficient layout across the app shell, forms, and views. These updates help you work efficiently by increasing your working area on forms and views, reducing the time you spend navigating pages, and aligning the experience with the latest Microsoft 365 design patterns.

Power Apps.feature_name: Get valuable insights and recommendations for your canvas app using Monitor
Power Apps.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Apps.description: When makers publish their Power Apps, they often don't know how to check the apps' operational health. Monitor gives makers visibility into app performance data and provides recommendations to improve app performance.

Power Pages.feature_name: Track Power Pages performance and usage with Monitor hub
Power Pages.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Pages.description: Enable makers, admins, and site creators to monitor Power Pages site performance and user experience in Monitor hub, reducing support costs and improving customer satisfaction.

Power Pages.feature_name: Enable secure server-side logic in Power Pages
Power Pages.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Power Pages.description: This feature empowers you as a developer or maker to build more secure, scalable, and integrated websites without relying on complex client-side workarounds. By moving logic to the server, organizations save development time, reduce security risks, and simplify API integrations. This leads to faster delivery of robust solutions, lower maintenance costs, and improved compliance with data protection standards.

Power Pages.feature_name: Create and delete websites using Power Platform CLI
Power Pages.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Pages.description: You can now create and delete websites with Power Platform command-line interface (CLI). With this capability, you can automate deployments and simplify application lifecycle management processes for Power Pages sites.

Power Automate.feature_name: Create and visualize custom KPIs in the process intelligence experience
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: Custom KPIs put your unique business priorities at the center of process analysis. While standard metrics provide valuable baseline insights, your competitive advantage often lies in tracking the specific measurements that drive your business, whether that's customer-specific SLAs, industry-specific compliance thresholds, or proprietary efficiency calculations. This feature enables your teams to define, calculate, and monitor the exact metrics that align with your strategic goals, without waitin

Power Automate.feature_name: Get support for normalized schema import for data ingestion
Power Automate.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Power Automate.description: Customers with existing data pipelines or data products in data mesh mostly want to stick to normalized, efficient forms such as star schema. Power Automate Process Mining currently requires you to transform the event log into a single-table form, where attributes with small cardinality are duplicated. Support for star schema reduces storage volumes and speeds up ingestion performance.

Power Automate.feature_name: Export object-centric process mining data to Microsoft Fabric semantic model
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: Publishing to Microsoft Fabric breaks down data silos and amplifies the impact of your process insights across your organization. Instead of keeping process analytics isolated in a standalone tool, your teams can now blend object-centric process metrics with financial data, operational KPIs, customer information, and other enterprise data sources within Fabric's unified platform. This means business analysts can build comprehensive Power BI reports that combine process performance with business

Microsoft Copilot Studio.feature_name: Get Microsoft 365 Copilot agent suggestions based on your work in Copilot Studio
Microsoft Copilot Studio.description: Help your makers get started faster by recommending agents tailored to their real work. By using Microsoft 365 Copilot memory, Copilot Studio surfaces relevant, ready-to-customize agent suggestions that reduce setup time and lower the effort required to build high-value agents. This enables more users to create useful agents with less manual configuration, accelerating adoption and time to value.

Microsoft Copilot Studio.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Copilot Studio.description: Makers can measure agent performance and return on investment (ROI) tailored to your organization's requirements and policies, thus ensuring business insights and decision-making are in line with your organization's approach.

Microsoft Copilot Studio.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Copilot Studio.description: Makers can now manage triggers natively in Copilot Studio and securely share autonomous agents that run with end-user credentials. This capability helps organizations save time, reduce complexity, and scale the adoption of secure, autonomous agents across their organization.

Microsoft Copilot Studio.feature_name: Invoke agents as workflow steps with the agent node
Microsoft Copilot Studio.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Copilot Studio.description: The agent node lets you embed reasoning directly into your workflow. This means fewer manual handoffs, faster processing times, and workflows that can handle nuanced decisions without additional development effort, helping teams automate more of their end-to-end processes and reduce operational overhead.

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Guided table selection for first‑time Dataverse sync
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Build your low code hyperscale backend on Dataverse
Microsoft Dataverse.description: Guided table selection removes a major source of friction for first‑time customers syncing Microsoft Dataverse data to Microsoft Fabric. Instead of being forced to initially sync all Dataverse tables and later navigate a complex “manage tables” experience to undo unnecessary selections, customers can choose exactly what they need upfront. This feature significantly reduces onboarding complexity for new admins, prevents accidental over‑syncing of hundreds of tables, and lowers storage and compute

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Monitor data management framework with Azure Monitor Application Insights
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Finance and operations cross application integration
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Microsoft Dataverse.description: Data management framework telemetry gives customers real‑time visibility into data import and export jobs. It provides progress tracking, detailed error insights, and proactive alerts through Azure Application Insights, helping teams troubleshoot faster, reduce operational effort, and run data management more reliably.

Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Improved enterprise experiences in Power Platform
Microsoft Dataverse.description: This release significantly improves the reliability and operational safety of bulk delete jobs in Microsoft Dataverse. By making failures easy to understand and configurations portable across environments, admins can execute large‑scale data cleanup with confidence, reducing troubleshooting time, lowering support dependency, and minimizing the risk of costly misconfigurations in higher environments.

Microsoft Power Platform governance and.feature_name: Deploy from Git with pipelines in Power Platform
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.product: Microsoft Power Platform governance and administration
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.description: The deploy from Git capability is available natively within the solutions experiences, ensuring citizen developers, code-first developers, and administrators can benefit from parallel development and the safety of guaranteeing only "checked in" changes get deployed. Additionally, Power Platform CLI and developer tools now support "pack" (build) for the new YAML solution format. This support ensures source code integration also works seamlessly with Azure DevOps pipelines, GitHub Actions, and non

Microsoft Power Platform governance and.feature_name: Automate governance with Agentic Center of Enablement
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.product: Microsoft Power Platform governance and administration
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.description: This feature transforms governance from reactive to proactive with AI agents that detect risks, prioritize issues, and automate remediation plans, which reduces manual effort and risk.
